function(x0: Nat) { 1.pow(x0) = 1 }(k)

not (g.pow(q).pow(k) * g.pow(r)).congr_mod(1 * g.pow(r), p) or lib(nat).nat_mod(g.pow(q).pow(k) * g.pow(r), p) = lib(nat).nat_mod(1 * g.pow(r), p)
function(x0: Nat) { 1 * x0 = x0 }(g.pow(r))

goal: g.pow(k * q + r) = g.pow(k * q) * g.pow(r)

not (g.pow(a) * y.pow(b)).congr_mod(g.pow(a) * g.pow(x * b), p) or lib(nat).nat_mod(g.pow(a) * g.pow(x * b), p) = lib(nat).nat_mod(g.pow(a) * y.pow(b), p)

is_dsa_params(p, q, g) = (p.is_prime and q.is_prime and q.divides(p - 1) and 1 < g and g < p and lib(nat).nat_mod(g.pow(q))(p) = 1)

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { (x0.is_prime and x1.is_prime and x1.divides(x0 - 1) and 1 < x2 and x2 < x0 and lib(nat).nat_mod(x2.pow(x1), x0) = 1) = is_dsa_params(x0, x1, x2) }(p, q, g)
function(x0: Nat) { not x0 < 0 }(1)

goal: is_dsa_keypair(p, q, g, x, y) = (0 < x and x < q and y = lib(nat).nat_mod(g.pow(x))(p))

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { (0 < x0 and x0 < x1 and lib(nat).nat_mod(x2.pow(x0), x3) = x4) = is_dsa_keypair(x3, x1, x2, x0, x4) }(x, q, g, p, y)

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0 * (x1 + x2 * x3), x4) = dsa_sign_s(x4, x1, x2, x3, x0) }(kinv, h, x, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), q)

goal: dsa_sign_s(q, h, x, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), kinv) < q

dsa_verify(p, q, g, y, h, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), dsa_sign_s(q, h, x, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), kinv), sinv) = (0 < dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k) and dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k) < q and 0 < dsa_sign_s(q, h, x, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), kinv) and dsa_sign_s(q, h, x, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), kinv) < q and is_mod_inverse(dsa_sign_s(q, h, x, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), kinv), sinv, q) and lib(nat).nat_mod(lib(nat).nat_mod(g.pow(lib(nat).nat_mod(h * sinv)(q)) * y.pow(lib(nat).nat_mod(dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k) * sinv)(q)))(p))(q) = dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k))

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat, x5: Nat, x6: Nat, x7: Nat) { (0 < x0 and x0 < x1 and 0 < x2 and x2 < x1 and is_mod_inverse(x2, x3, x1) and lib(nat).nat_mod(lib(nat).nat_mod(x4.pow(lib(nat).nat_mod(x5 * x3, x1)) * x6.pow(lib(nat).nat_mod(x0 * x3, x1)), x7), x1) = x0) = dsa_verify(x7, x1, x4, x6, x5, x0, x2, x3) }(dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), q, dsa_sign_s(q, h, x, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), kinv), sinv, g, h, y, p)

goal: dsa_verify(p, q, g, y, h, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), dsa_sign_s(q, h, x, dsa_sign_r(p, q, g, k), kinv), sinv)
